author: doll-agent
content: Added predict_proba, score_samples, and score to FittedGaussianMixture and FittedBayesianGaussianMixture. GMM reuses log_responsibilities + log_sum_exp_rows; BGMM gets a new unnormalized_log_prob helper that mirrors compute_responsibilities but returns per-row log-sum-exp instead of normalized posteriors. predict_proba returns soft responsibilities (rows sum to 1); score_samples returns per-sample log-likelihood; score returns mean per-sample log-likelihood. All 332 tests still pass after the additions.
